seams: H-G3P-NECESSITY (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): under blind two-pass rendering, the proxy judge pair finds a necessity-violation rate consistent with the frozen g3 survives-bar — PASS-analog iff the UNION-rule rate's one-sided 95% Wilson UB <= 0.10; FAIL-analog iff the CONCORDANT-rule rate's Wilson LB > 0.10 (each verdict direction must clear under the pre-declared combination rule LEAST favourable to it); anything between is INCONCLUSIVE. A PASS-analog is a WEAK FEASIBILITY SIGNAL only; a FAIL-analog is the g3-kill early-warning analog at this proxy id
H-G3P-SUFFICIENCY (secondary, same bracket rule): sufficiency-violation rate vs the same 0.10 bar; reported with both bracket bounds; never fires the primary verdict

H-G3P-PAIR (instrument, FAIL-direction gates): cross-family judge-pair kappa on the necessity indicator (frozen kappa < 0.4 rule carried over as judge-pair instability => INSTRUMENT-INVALID) + per-judge escape/coverage gates + the mismatched-conditions probe (correct answer 'no' by construction; false-satisfaction >= 0.30 invalidates); pass directions validate nothing about human agreement
summary: Experiment g3-llmproxy-v3: verdict FAIL. Hypotheses: H-G3P-NECESSITY (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): under blind two-pass rendering, the proxy judge pair finds a necessity-violation rate consistent with the frozen g3 survives-bar — PASS-analog iff the UNION-rule rate's one-sided 95% Wilson UB <= 0.10; FAIL-analog iff the CONCORDANT-rule rate's Wilson LB > 0.10 (each verdict direction must clear under the pre-declared combination rule LEAST favourable to it); anything between is INCONCLUSIVE. A PASS-analog is a WEAK FEASIBILITY SIGNAL only; a FAIL-analog is the g3-kill early-warning analog at this proxy id, H-G3P-SUFFICIENCY (secondary, same bracket rule): sufficiency-violation rate vs the same 0.10 bar; reported with both bracket bounds; never fires the primary verdict, H-G3P-PAIR (instrument, FAIL-direction gates): cross-family judge-pair kappa on the necessity indicator (frozen kappa < 0.4 rule carried over as judge-pair instability => INSTRUMENT-INVALID) + per-judge escape/coverage gates + the mismatched-conditions probe (correct answer 'no' by construction; false-satisfaction >= 0.30 invalidates); pass directions validate nothing about human agreement. Endpoints: primary(primary)=0.41705877302212124; sec-sufficiency(secondary)=0.17273610174957482; sec-kappa-gate(secondary)=0.5616239090187781; sec-probe-gate(secondary)=True; sec-per-judge-diagnostics(secondary)={'judge-pA': 0.24102564102564103, 'judge-pB': 0.30256410256410254}. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): g3-llmproxy-v3 kill (PROXY-ONLY, zero GPU, the two-human g3.annotate role filled by the pinned cross-family LLM pair): FAIL-analog fires iff the CONCORDANT necessity-violation rate's one-sided 95% Wilson LB > 0.10 over dual-decisive instances (violations derived per the frozen rule verbatim: necessity violation iff q1=yes and q2=no; concordant = both judges). This mirrors the frozen g3 kill ('necessity failures >10% => defeasible-script stands, HS2 auto-resolves sidecar-only') in FORM ONLY; it can neither fire nor discharge g3's own kill — HS2 auto-resolution, g5 pruning and Pi demotion can be triggered ONLY by the human-annotated g3. A proxy FAIL-analog warrants pausing Pi-hardening investment and escalating to the maintainer, formally scoped to this proxy id. Degeneracy discipline (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS): preflight failure; per-judge per-pass cannot-say > 5% or no-label > 5%; n_dual_decisive < 170 of 200; kappa_pair < 0.4; probe-B false-satisfaction >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 27/30 for either judge. Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE ADJUDICATING STUDY: the two-independent-human g3.annotate role (GATE-H, ~8-10h, blind to hypotheses) is filled by a pinned cross-family LLM pair (judge-pA GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1 effort low; judge-pB Claude Haiku 4.5 via headless claude -p under the truthstyle-2x2 section-4.3 hardening) because the human annotators are unsourced at run time (open decision O-3); g3 (frozen_sha256 ef9608c60fc0355074b2d50132bbc79cbe49c5e9b578c724d81d31ce95bef7aa) remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and is the ONLY experiment on this line whose readout adjudicates HS3 or triggers the HS2 sidecar auto-resolution and g5 pruning. The violation rates here ARE two LLMs' blind judgments of ordinary usage and literal condition satisfaction — NOT native-speaker human competence, which is the HS3 estimand. Binding weakenings: (1) ESTIMAND GAP — LLM ordinary-usage and literal-reading judgments approximate human judgments with unproven systematic offsets (ASM-0532); the pass-B literalism channel can push the necessity rate UP (hyper-literal condition failures) or DOWN (charitable reading), direction unproven, so NEITHER verdict direction is a measurement of the human rates. (2) PAIR, NOT PANEL — the cross-family pair is stronger than a single-family pair (kappa carries cross-family diagnostic content) but both judges are web-scale-trained LLMs with shared exposure to ordinary-language usage data; kappa is judge-pair stability, never inter-HUMAN-annotator agreement evidence; judge-pB's vendor family overlaps the materials' authoring agents (disclosed). (3) BRACKET RULE, NOT THE HUMAN COMBINATION RULE — the human record's combination rule is deliberately open; this record's pre-declared concordant/union bracket (ASM-0531) makes each verdict direction conservative under ITS least favourable rule, and the eventual human round is free to fix its own rule — the proxy consumes no open decision. (4) TRADITION FAMILIARITY — both judge families plausibly contain NSM-adjacent literature (ASM-0552); the mismatched-conditions probe bounds only crude non-literal endorsement. (5) LICENSE OF A PASS — a PASS-analog means exactly: 'a blind cross-family LLM pair, under the frozen two-pass rendering with working escapes, finds union-rule necessity violations at <= the 0.10 Wilson bar on the 200 pinned instances'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550). It does NOT adjudicate HS3, does NOT resolve HS2, does NOT un-prune or prune g5, does NOT demote or confirm Pi as more than lint, does NOT substitute for the GATE-H human annotation, and does NOT extend to human annotators, other concepts, other instance distributions, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (6) ASYMMETRIC READING — the disclosed channels have UNPROVEN direction here (unlike the endorsement-style records), so the bracket rule carries the conservatism instead: a FAIL-analog (concordant LB > 0.10 despite the lower bracket) is a strong early warning — pause Pi-hardening investment and escalate — while a PASS-analog licenses only continued investment (human annotator sourcing, Pi-line engineering) and never upgrades any claim. (7) Instance bytes, condition renderings, pass instructions and the derived-violation rules are byte-identical to the pinned human materials; per-item proxy labels are pinned so the eventual human round yields a free human-vs-proxy bias measurement (ASM-0553); nothing else carries over.
title: Registry verdict: g3-llmproxy-v3
